SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY GORDON CHAN, LEGAL ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT PAUL R. FARRAR DBA BUDGET ALARMS IS PRESENT. GEORGIANN M. FARRAR DBA BUDGET ALARMS IS NOT PRESENT NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARRAR, PAUL R DBA BUDGET ALARMS FARRAR, GEORGEANN M DBA BUDGET ALARMS $4,609.90 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,799.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
